description: You are an audio software developer working on `midi_builder`, a Python library for generating Standard MIDI Files (SMF) for a generative music project. The library, located at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/midi_builder`, is currently producing corrupted MIDI files that fail to load in DAWs or play back with incorrect rhythm. Fix the binary encoding and sequencing logic in `midi_builder/encoder.py` and `midi_builder/sequencer.py` to resolve issues with Variable Length Quantity (VLQ) encoding for values > 127, rhythmic drift in delta time calculations, and missing End of Track markers. Ensure all tests in the project pass and the generated MIDI files are valid.
